text: At what point is this “consulting” considered stealing from the people of San Francisco?
thread: At what point is this “consulting” considered stealing from the people of San Francisco?

text: So you’re telling me the way to stop election rigging is MORE election rigging 🤔 https://t.co/16q3odF1bY
thread: So you’re telling me the way to stop election rigging is MORE election rigging 🤔 https://t.co/16q3odF1bY
reply:
every big problem is just a cycle of “fight corruption with more corruption” until the whole rube goldberg machine collapses and resets
history is vibes and whoever vibes harder wins
always love when someone manages to say the thing you’ve been turning over in your head for weeks, insanely satisfying. banger status well-earned tbh

text:
Abundance done right is building housing, bringing back American manufacturing and creating jobs

Everything else is NIMBY anti-people anti-jobs  BS that weakens California and America
thread:
Abundance done right is building housing, bringing back American manufacturing and creating jobs

Everything else is NIMBY anti-people anti-jobs  BS that weakens California and America
reply: Real abundance is measured by what regular ppl can actually access, not just how much “growth” gets reported in some spreadsheet somewhere. You can call anything abundance but if it doesn’t lower rent, create jobs, or make life less of a grind for normies, it’s just window dressing.

text:
This week's Uncapped guest was @roelofbotha, who runs Sequoia.

We talked about his psychology leading the firm, how Sequoia makes decisions, and his views on the state of technology markets today.

Unsurprisingly, I learned a ton. Hope you enjoy listening. https://t.co/07mb26KEBC
thread:

text:
we fixed so there should be way fewer unnecessary prompt blocks on sora

Dependency injection with @EffectTS_  just feels insanely nice

especially when using cloud providers - you can have a Cloud1Resource, Cloud2Resource and a NodeResource. Swap between them based on requirements of customers, or availability issues. https://t.co/bAl8m6MU8m
thread:
Dependency injection with @EffectTS_  just feels insanely nice

especially when using cloud providers - you can have a Cloud1Resource, Cloud2Resource and a NodeResource. Swap between them based on requirements of customers, or availability issues. https://t.co/bAl8m6MU8m
reply: never thought I’d see DI get its flowers on here 😂 but honestly the contrast between good DI and a tangle of singletons you can never untangle makes you realize how much unnecessary pain most infra/software is

text:
You have to be comfortable with being misunderstood. This is basically the core tenet of emotional maturity. You're exhausted but not complaining about it. Going above and beyond but not fishing for validation. Ensuring things run smoothly but making it look easy

Internally, you
thread:
You have to be comfortable with being misunderstood. This is basically the core tenet of emotional maturity. You're exhausted but not complaining about it. Going above and beyond but not fishing for validation. Ensuring things run smoothly but making it look easy

Internally, you
reply:
The people who most need to hear this will read it and just feel even more alone lol. 
Emotional maturity is like mastering the art of hiding the body. No one knows what you went through, they just enjoy the clean, empty room.
